'''Ziering''' was a capable and dedicated [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]].

==Biography==
Ziering planned to retire to the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], but was killed by [[Amani/Legends|Amanin]] tribal warriors on [[Maridun/Legends|Maridun]] before he could make real his dream. During the [[Battle of Maridun (0 ABY)|Battle of Maridun]], General Ziering was so impressed by a young [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] named [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]] that he gave the young officer field promotions to [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and later [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. When [[Amani/Legends|Amanin]] warriors destroyed a [[HAVw A5 Juggernaut|Juggernaut]] in a surprise attack at night, Ziering lost his eye. He had great faith in Sunber and his plans, disapproving of Captain [[Gage]]'s policy of working little and delegating everything to subordinates.

{{Char-stub}}
